Actions.Text: REFERRED TO INVESTIGATIONS AND GOVERNMENT OPERATIONS
REFERRED TO INVESTIGATIONS AND GOVERNMENT OPERATIONS

Title: Incentivizes projects on certain Brownfield sites
Summary: Incentivizes projects on certain Brownfield sites through enhanced tax credits.
LawCode: Amd §21, Tax L; amd §27-1419, En Con L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the tax law and the environmental conservation law, in relation to incentivizing projects on certain Brownfield sites
